task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the hardware integration specification document to read the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or cat in terminal) displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/lidar_integration_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens QGroundControl and navigates to the parameter configuration menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application window is open, with the 'Vehicle Setup' menu (gear icon) selected and the 'Parameters' tab active.

task_completion.description: Verify the serial communication parameters for Telem2 are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, look for 'SERIAL2_PROTOCOL' set to 11 and 'SERIAL2_BAUD' set to 115. This may be visible in the parameter list, search results, or an active parameter edit dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the proximity sensing parameter is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, look for 'PRX1_TYPE' set to 5. This may be visible in the parameter list, search results, or an active parameter edit dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the obstacle avoidance (OA) parameters are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, look for 'OA_TYPE' set to 1, 'OA_BR_LOOKAHEAD' set to 8, and 'OA_MARGIN_MAX' set to 2.5. This may be visible in the parameter list, search results, or active parameter edit dialogs.

task_completion.description: Verify the general avoidance and waypoint navigation speed parameters are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Parameters screen, look for 'AVOID_ENABLE' set to 2 and 'WPNAV_SPEED' set to 300. This may be visible in the parameter list, search results, or active parameter edit dialogs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the QGroundControl GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl graphical interface being used (e.g., clicking menus, typing in the parameter search bar), rather than just running MAVLink terminal scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the parameters within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for QGroundControl parameter edit dialog boxes popping up, or parameters highlighted in green/red indicating they have been modified and saved to the vehicle.

integrity.description: Verify the agent read the specification document rather than guessing the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specification document '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/lidar_integration_spec.txt' must be visible on screen in at least one screenshot before or during the parameter configuration process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/lidar_integration_spec.txt. The 8 required QGroundControl parameters and their exact target values are: PRX1_TYPE=5, SERIAL2_PROTOCOL=11, SERIAL2_BAUD=115, OA_TYPE=1, OA_BR_LOOKAHEAD=8, OA_MARGIN_MAX=2.5, AVOID_ENABLE=2, and WPNAV_SPEED=300.
